data.title: Solana's (SOL) price at $177.41 holds steady with 1.49% daily gains. Mixed signals from indicators create uncertainty.
data.description: As of the latest update, SOL is being traded at $177.41, showing a daily increase of 1.49%. The technical analysis indicates a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) divergence. This has resulted in an uncertain trading environment for investors and traders.

data.title: DOGE price rises 4% to over $0.23 amid whale accumulation, with institutional interest growing amidst bullish momentum.
data.description: The Dogecoin (DOGE) is currently trading at $0.23, marking a daily increase of 3.97%. This surge is attributed to significant buying activity from whales, which has piqued the interest of institutional investors. Technical indicators suggest a bullish trend as the momentum remains strong above crucial resistance levels.

data.title: Cardano (ADA) remains firm above $0.80, eyes next resistance. Price at $0.80 (+0.68% daily) post $71M upgrade approval and 11.80% weekly rise.
data.description: Cardano (ADA) is currently trading at $0.80, reflecting a daily increase of 0.68%. Technical indicators suggest a bullish trend after receiving approval for a $71 million upgrade. The cryptocurrency also experienced a notable 11.80% surge over the past week.

data.title: BNB price hits $797 amid $1.2B Binance inflow, up 1.54% daily. New staking program boosts bullish trend.
data.description: Binance Coin is currently trading at $797.28, which represents a 1.54% increase for the day. This follows a significant inflow of $1.2 billion into the exchange and the launch of a new staking program. Technical indicators suggest a highly bullish trend for the coin.

data.title: ETH price surpasses $4,000 resistance, hitting $4,048.74 (+3.22%), due to $222M ETF inflows and institutional buying.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum is currently valued at $4,048.74, showing a 3.22% increase. This surge follows a breakout from a multi-year triangle pattern. The rise in price is attributed to significant factors, including $222 million in ETF inflows and signals of institutional accumulation.

data.title: EU's trade deal balances political priorities, protecting chicken and beef standards; notable concessions made, including for lobsters.
data.description: A recent trade agreement within the European Union prioritized certain political concerns, such as maintaining standards for chicken and beef, alongside offering significant concessions including the consideration of lobsters. This deal aimed to balance various interests within the EU and safeguard important sectors while ensuring trade benefits.

data.title: Bitcoin price remains steady above $116K despite ETF withdrawals. Current price at $116,345.99 with a daily decrease of 0.34%. Support at $111,920 with neutral RSI indicating consolidation in the near future.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin (BTC) is currently trading at $116,345.99, experiencing a slight decrease of 0.34% within the day. This comes in the midst of notable regulatory developments and concerns regarding Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs). A critical support level is identified at $111,920, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) in a neutral position indicating a potential consolidation period on the horizon.

data.title: Trump is pushing for rate cuts, Scott Bessent leading search for new Fed Chair to succeed Powell. List of candidates includes around 10 prominent figures. tensions have escalated between Trump and Powell.
data.description: The search for a new Federal Reserve Chair has intensified as President Donald Trump advocates for lower interest rates. U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is at the forefront of this search for Jerome Powell's successor. The list of potential candidates has now expanded to approximately 10 individuals, including notable names such as St. Louis Fed President James Bullard and Marc Sumerlin, a former economic advisor to President George W. Bush. Trump's repeated demands for interest rate cuts have strained his relationship with Powell, whose term is nearing its end. The tensions between the two have been ongoing since 2025. These developments, including Trump's criticisms of Powell's rate decisions, have been confirmed by various sources.

data.title: Canaan Inc. reveals robust Bitcoin (BTC) mining stats in July 2025, showcasing enhanced output and operational changes.
data.description: In the latest update for July 2025, Canaan Inc. has reported enhanced Bitcoin mining performance and key operational changes. The company has notably shifted focus away from Kazakhstan.

data.title: Moat stocks shine in July, outperforming mega-caps in a market analysis by VanEck.
data.description: Moat stocks reported exceptional resilience and robust performance in July, amidst a market largely influenced by mega-cap momentum, as per VanEck's findings. This signifies a remarkable achievement particularly given the current economic climate, with these stocks showing notable strength and stability during this period. This suggests a promising outlook for investors involved in this sector, highlighting the potential for solid returns despite the prevailing market conditions.

data.title: C3.ai reports Q1 preliminary revenue and loss far below expectations, causing stock drop.
data.description: C3.ai revealed preliminary numbers for the fiscal first quarter ending in July which were significantly below expectations. The company reported a sharp decline in revenue and higher losses than anticipated, causing AI stock to plummet. This news resulted in a negative impact on the company's financial performance for the quarter.

data.title: Stock market bullish last week, Nasdaq at record high, Google, Tesla, Apple show buy signals. Dow Jones Futures rise.
data.description: Last week, the stock market experienced a significant rally, resulting in the Nasdaq reaching a new high. During this time, there was a notable divergence in the market trends. Prominent companies like Google, Tesla, and Apple showed buy signals, indicating positive performance. This surge was reflected in Dow Jones Futures, where Apple played a key role in driving the Nasdaq to its peak. The market activity highlighted the potential investment opportunities presented by Google and Tesla as they also displayed buy signals.

data.title: $105M in Ether shorts 'smoked' as Ether surpasses $4,000; Eric Trump advises against betting on Bitcoin and Ether bears.
data.description: Eric Trump cautioned against underestimating Bitcoin and Ether as the price of Ether surpassed $4,000, hitting this milestone for the first time in eight months.

data.title: Eric Trump happy after $105 million Ether shorts loss. Ether hits $4,000, he'll avoid betting against Bitcoin and Ether.
data.description: Eric Trump has cautioned against doubting Bitcoin and Ether, especially as Ether hit a milestone by crossing $4,000 for the first time in eight months.

data.title: American Foundation of Savoy Orders to host 19th annual Lecture Series on Oct 9, 2025 in NYC with guest speaker.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, the 19th annual Lecture Series hosted by the American Foundation of Savoy Orders, Inc. will take place at a private club in New York City. The event will focus on the topic "Pope Pius IX and The Kingdom of Italy" and will feature Professor Caroline Weber as the guest speaker.

data.title: Elegoo launches $1M Creator Fund to support and reward creators of original 3D model designs.
data.description: A new initiative has been introduced in SHENZHEN, China on August 8, 2025, marking the launch of a unique fund to support creators. Elegoo, a prominent global smart manufacturing brand, has rolled out a groundbreaking $1 million creator fund. This initiative aims to assist creators in earning from their original 3D model designs. The fund, the first of its kind with seven-digit funding, is designed to incentivize and reward exceptional creativity in the industry.

data.title: VIQ Solutions Inc. (TSX: VQS) amends credit agreement with Beedie Investments Ltd. to amend terms of agreement.
data.description: VIQ Solutions Inc., a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: VQS) and specializing in secure digital voice and video capture technology and transcription services, has recently signed an eighth amendment agreement with Beedie Investments Ltd. The amendment will modify specific terms of the credit agreement that was originally established on January 13, 2023, between VIQ and the Lender. This development marks a significant step for VIQ Solutions as it continues to navigate its financial operations.

data.title: ThinkCareBelieve praises President Trump's achievements in first 200 days, citing data showing all income groups benefitted. Peace agreement between Armenia and Azerbaijan reached. Leaders nominate Trump for Nobel Peace Prize. Russia~Ukraine war avoided escalation.
data.description: ThinkCareBelieve's article highlights the accomplishments of President Trump and his team during the first 200 days in office, focusing on the positive impact on all income groups in America. The new census bureau data, presented by Stephen Moore, reveals improvements in lower, middle, and upper income families. Notably, the highest income bracket benefited the least but still saw positive changes. In a significant development, a Trilateral Peace Agreement between Armenia and Azerbaijan was brokered, marking the end of a 30-year conflict. Both leaders praised President Trump for his role in achieving peace and plan to nominate him for the Nobel Peace Prize. President Trump emphasized his administration's efforts in saving lives and preventing potential conflicts, hinting at a future meeting involving Russia and Ukraine. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Savoy Foundation to host 19th Annual Lecture Series in NYC on Oct 9, 2025, focusing on Pope Pius IX and The Kingdom of Italy.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, PRNewswire reported that the Savoy Foundation will be organizing its 19th annual Lecture Series on October 9, 2025 at a private club in New York City. The lecture will focus on the topic "Pope Pius IX and The Kingdom of Italy." The event will feature a guest speaker and is expected to attract a large audience interested in the historical connection between Pope Pius IX and Italy.

data.title: Dark Horse CPAs hires Joey Kinney as Principal Accelerator in Albuquerque, NM, to expand SMB CFO & accounting practice. #CPA #Accounting #Expansion
data.description: In Cardiff By The Sea, California on August 8, 2025, Dark Horse CPAs, a leading national accounting and tax company catering to small businesses and individuals, reveals the appointment of Joseph Kinney, CPA, also known as Joey Kinney, as a Principal Accelerator in its groundbreaking Principal Accelerator Program.
